title: trisetum trinii var. majus
intro: Trisetum trinii var. majus, also known as Trin's false brome or large false brome, is a type of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Trisetum trinii var. majus include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems. Traditionally, the plant can be prepared as a tea by steeping its leaves and stems in hot water, or as a tincture by mixing its extract with a solvent.
